page_content:
ISRL658 Special Topics in Israeli Culture (3 Credits)

An exploration of aspects of Israeli culture. Topics will vary.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-Meyerhoff Program & Center for Jewish Studies.

Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

772 ITAL - Italian

ISRL699 Independent Study in Israel Studies (3 Credits)

This graduate-level independent study allows graduate students to work closely with an Israel Studies faculty member of their choice, pending prior approval of the faculty member. In this independent study, graduate students will focus on a topic specific to Israel Studies.
